scope.summary: Register the already-reviewed cloud command handlers in the Tauri invoke handler list. This owns only the root src-tauri/src/lib.rs registration diff that is unlayered by ADR-0003's directory model.
goals: Expose command-layer cloud handlers to the Svelte UI through Tauri invoke
Keep local-mode commands and state registration unchanged
nonGoals: Changing the local Tauri layer ordering

acceptance.description: Tauri core tests pass with cloud handler registration present.
Tauri clippy is clean with warnings denied.
